description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a long, straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade features a central fuller running along its length, adding both structural strength and visual interest. The crossguard is distinctive, with two symmetrical, outward-curving spikes and a circular opening at the center, giving it a unique and aggressive appearance. The handle is straight and solid, ending in a geometric pommel that mirrors the angular design of the blade. The entire object appears to be made from a dark, metallic material with a glossy finish, suggesting both durability and a modern aesthetic. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements beyond the bold geometry of the guard and pommel.
description: A sleek, dark, double-edged sword with a central fuller, spiked crossguard, and geometric pommel, all in a glossy metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the straight blade, the central fuller, the circular crossguard with outward spikes, and the straight handle with a geometric pommel.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's narrowness and the circular crossguard's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the blade, fuller, spiked crossguard, and handle, with no additional features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the slim edge of the blade and the thickness of the crossguard.
